description_long: This is a medium-sized rectangular cardboard parcel, commonly used for shipping and delivery in urban environments. The box is constructed from corrugated brown cardboard, with visible vertical and horizontal creases indicating fold lines and flaps. A wide strip of brown packing tape runs along the top seam, securing the flaps closed. On the upper surface, there are red printed handling symbols, including a fragile icon and an umbrella, suggesting the contents require careful handling and protection from moisture. A barcode is printed on one side, typical for tracking and inventory purposes. The surface has a matte, slightly rough texture, characteristic of standard shipping boxes.
description: A medium brown cardboard shipping box with packing tape, red handling symbols, and a barcode. The surface is matte and slightly rough, typical of urban delivery parcels.
description_view_0: The front view shows the broad face of the box with a barcode in the lower right corner and faint horizontal creases.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the top seam with brown tape and red handling symbols, with the tape running vertically down the center.
description_view_2: The opposite broad face is visible, again showing the barcode and a clear view of the taped top seam.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the taped seam and red handling symbols on the top, with the tape running vertically and the box's side panel visible.
